title: Rgb Animated Xp Bar x16
description: Animated your XP bar in Vanilla Minecraft
body:
**Rgb animated xp bar in vanilla.**
So Mojang in some back versions. Let us to customize gui further, even add animation on it. So i create this resource pack to continue my project:
[smootheez-rgb-xp-bar-16x](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/rgb-animated-xp-bar)
Because before this added it's not possible to create animated gui in vanilla Minecraft. But now you can so enjoy :). ### 16X Example Animation ![https://i.imgur.com/qWQPn9K.gif](https://i.imgur.com/qWQPn9K.gif)
**_Note:_** Xp text is still green actually
